name: LigandMPNN
description: Given an input pdb which contains a protein and a small molecule, nucleotide, or metal, design a set of sequences for that backbone. Extends ProteinMPNN to include enzymes, protein-nucleic acids, protein-metal, and protein-small molecule binders.
capabilities: Given an input pdb which contains a protein and a small molecule, nucleotide, or metal, design a set of sequences for that backbone
Extends ProteinMPNN to include enzymes, protein-nucleic acids, protein-metal, and protein-small molecule binders

pdbFile.description: Input PDB containing protein and small molecule, nucleotide, or metal

designedResidues.description: Residues to design. Format: {chain}{residue} (e.g., A10 B15). If not set, all residues are designed.

fixedResidues.description: Residues to keep fixed during design

temperature.description: Sampling temperature controlling sequence diversity. Higher values generate more mutations.

omitAminoAcids.description: Amino acids to omit from being sampled
